ddt:Target.Name: N_P33A_AB_SRS_UDS_Sharp1_20201012
ddt:Target.Description:
[2]Oct 12th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Solved Db checker's error based on V1.10.
[1]Dec 25th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Added item : CF.
[N]Feb 2nd, 2018 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation based on N_L21B_AB_SRS_UDS_VC_20171220.xml.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: ODO/TRIP METER.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Warning lamp , failure in airbag system.value

Item.Text: SB No monitored / presence not monitored

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: DataWrite.WS_$A02A_#004_bit0_Key = key to authorize the request A02A
OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Item.Text: Warning lamp , failure in airbag system

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: Warning lamp , failure in airbag system.param

Item.Text: SB No monitored / presence not monitored

DataRead_$A002_#005_bit5_Airbag OFF Lamp ON (real state of the lamp, not the state of ECU order)
DataRead_$A002_#005_bit4_Airbag Warning Lamp ON (current state given by dashboard)
DataRead_$A002_#005_bit2_Airbag ON lamp swicthed ON (real state of the lamp, not the state of ECU order)
DataRead_$A002_#005_EDR activation (1 : EDR activated, 0 : EDR not activated)
